svg.title: Arms of the University of Stirling

cc:Work.dc:title: Arms of the University of Stirling
cc:Work.dc:description: Per fess enarched Vert and barr‑wavy Azure and Argent a bow‑arched bridge of seven arches in fess Argent ensigned with a tower of the last, masoned sable, window Gules. between three open books two and one proper, fore‑edges and binding Or.
